en: Then he led me out into the outer court, toward the north, and he brought me to the chambers that were opposite the separate yard and opposite the building on the north.
zh: 他領我出來，向著北面的外院去；帶我到了祭司的房子。這些房子一排對著殿院的空地，一排對著北面的建築物。

en: The length of the building whose door faced north was a hundred cubits, and the breadth fifty cubits.
zh: 房子共長五十公尺，寬二十五公尺，有朝北的門。

en: Facing the twenty cubits that belonged to the inner court, and facing the pavement that belonged to the outer court, was gallery against gallery in three stories.
zh: 這些房子一排對著內院十公尺寬的空地，一排對著外院的鋪石地，在三層樓上，都有走廊對著走廊。

en: And before the chambers was a passage inward, ten cubits wide and a hundred cubits long, and their doors were on the north.
zh: 房子前面有一條夾道，寬五公尺，長五十公尺。房子的門都朝向北面。

en: Now the upper chambers were narrower, for the galleries took more away from them than from the lower and middle chambers of the building.
zh: 上層的房子最窄，因為上層的走廊所佔的地方，比下層和中層的為多。

en: For they were in three stories, and they had no pillars like the pillars of the courts. Thus the upper chambers were set back from the ground more than the lower and the middle ones.
zh: 第三層房子沒有柱子，不像外院的房子有柱子。因此，上層比下層和中層較窄。

en: And there was a wall outside parallel to the chambers, toward the outer court, opposite the chambers, fifty cubits long.
zh: 在外面有一道牆，在房子的前面，與房子和外院平行，長二十五公尺。

en: For the chambers on the outer court were fifty cubits long, while those opposite the nave were a hundred cubits long.
zh: 朝著外院的房子，長二十五公尺；朝著聖殿的房子，長五十公尺。

en: Below these chambers was an entrance on the east side, as one enters them from the outer court.
zh: 下層的房子在東面有一個入口，人從外院進入房子裡。

en: In the thickness of the wall of the court, on the south also, opposite the yard and opposite the building, there were chambers
zh: 在南面 ，沿著內院的牆也有房子，一排對著殿院的空地，一排對著南面的建築物。

en: with a passage in front of them. They were similar to the chambers on the north, of the same length and breadth, with the same exits and arrangements and doors,
zh: 這些房子前面有一條夾道，跟北面的一樣，長寬相同。出口之處，也與北面的一樣。

en: as were the entrances of the chambers on the south. There was an entrance at the beginning of the passage, the passage before the corresponding wall on the east as one enters them.
zh: 南邊的房子的門，也與北面的一樣。在東面夾道的開端，與牆相對的地方，有門可以進入。

en: Then he said to me, "The north chambers and the south chambers opposite the yard are the holy chambers, where the priests who approach the LORD shall eat the most holy offerings. There they shall put the most holy offerings- the grain offering, the sin offering, and the guilt offering, for the place is holy.
zh: 他對我說：“在南北兩面，朝著殿院空地的房子，都是聖潔的房子；親近耶和華的祭司們要在那裡吃至聖之物，也要在那裡存放至聖之物，就是素祭、贖罪祭和贖愆祭的祭物，因為那地方是聖的。

en: When the priests enter the Holy Place, they shall not go out of it into the outer court without laying there the garments in which they minister, for these are holy. They shall put on other garments before they go near to that which is for the people."
zh: 祭司進了去，不可從聖所出來到外院去；他們要在房子裡放下供職時所穿的衣服，因為那些衣服是聖的；他們要穿上別的衣服，才可以到民眾的地方。”

en: Now when he had finished measuring the interior of the temple area, he led me out by the gate that faced east, and measured the temple area all around.
zh: 他量了內院，就領我出朝東的門，又量了整個殿的周圍。

en: He measured the east side with the measuring reed, 500 cubits by the measuring reed all around.
zh: 他用測量竿量了東面，按著測量竿計算，共長二百五十公尺。

en: He measured the north side, 500 cubits by the measuring reed all around.
zh: 他又量了北面，按著測量竿計算，共長二百五十公尺。

en: He measured the south side, 500 cubits by the measuring reed.
zh: 他又量了南面，按著測量竿計算，共長二百五十公尺。

en: Then he turned to the west side and measured, 500 cubits by the measuring reed.
zh: 他又轉去量了西面，按著測量竿計算，共長二百五十公尺。

en: He measured it on the four sides. It had a wall around it, 500 cubits long and 500 cubits broad, to make a separation between the holy and the common.
zh: 這樣，他量了四面。聖殿長二百五十公尺，寬二百五十公尺，四圍都有牆，為要分開聖地和俗地。
